scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.secrets:scan: gitleaks detect --no-banner --redact -c .gitleaks.toml || echo "gitleaks not installed — see TESTING.md"
scripts.deps:audit: npm audit --omit=dev --prefix backend; npm audit --omit=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.qa: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:ui
